keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $707.71 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $748.17 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Neutral — watch only — wait for confirmation.
Signals are conflicted — let the first 30 minutes set the tone before committing risk.
Use QQQ $707.71 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: TSLA PUT — enter $14.03–$15.51, target $22.16+, stop $8.86.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a softer open with QQQ -0.18% and SPY -0.01%. Composite sentiment -11 (Neutral). The tape is being driven mainly by sector rotation, small caps (iwm), qqq / mega-cap tech. VIX at 15.41 (+0.82%). Environment read: watch only — wait for confirmation. Energy (+2.00%) is leading while Financials (-1.63%) lags. Premarket strength in NFLX, XOM; weakness in PLTR, COIN. The desk's highest-conviction setup is TSLA (7.1/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
